topic: When the Foot Is Out of Alignment, the Whole Body Listens. Knee, Hip, Back pain
keyPoints:
Total body Wellness Pain in knees, hips, or back may originate from the feet
The body functions as a connected chain, not isolated parts
Every step creates force that travels through the body
Misalignment in the foot can send shockwaves upward
callToAction: If you want to learn how to rebuild your body from the ground up…  restore your posture…  and move the way your body was designed to…  Subscribe to the channel.  This is the Well of Wellness.  And this is your…  Sole Purpose.
